title: grewia triflora
intro: Grewia triflora, also known as the three-flowered false buckthorn, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves, which are used to treat various health conditions. The leaves have been traditionally used to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to their anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The leaves can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and are also used in traditional herbal preparations such as ointments and salves.
